---
title: "XAI3 — Partial Dependence Plots"
subtitle: "GitHub Repository Link"
author: "Robert Torres Mingarro, Joel Porcar Sales, Maria Porta Molina"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
---

## GitHub Repository

The full report, R Markdown source files, and datasets for this assignment are available at the following repository:

**[https://github.com/RobertTorres16/XAI3-Partial-Dependence-Plots](https://github.com/RobertTorres16/XAI3-Partial-Dependence-Plots)**

The repository contains:

- `XAI3_PDP_Report.pdf` — rendered PDF report
- `XAI3_PDP_Report.Rmd` — R Markdown source (PDF output)
- `XAI3_PDP_Report_HTML.Rmd` — R Markdown source (HTML output, code visible)
- `XAI3_PDP_Report_HTML.html` — rendered HTML report
- `day.csv` — Capital-Bikeshare daily dataset
- `kc_house_data.csv` — King County house prices dataset
- `README.md` — project description

The repository uses two branches: `master` (final version) and `development` (working branch).
